div.class: app-container max-w-md mx-auto bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] border-t-4 border-[#EE4D2D] p-6 sm:p-8 mt-4 mb-20 min-h-[450px] relative
w-16 h-16 mx-auto bg-gradient-to-tr from-orange-50 to-orange-100 text-[#EE4D2D] rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-3xl font-bold mb-3 shadow-inner border border-orange-200

div.p: Masuk atau daftar untuk mengelola pesanan.

div.class: flex border-b border-gray-100 mb-6 bg-gray-50 p-1 rounded-xl

button.class: flex-1 py-2.5 font-bold text-[13px] rounded-lg bg-white shadow text-[#EE4D2D] transition-all duration-200 outline-none
flex-1 py-2.5 font-bold text-[13px] rounded-lg text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700 transition-all duration-200 outline-none

div.class: hidden p-3.5 rounded-xl text-[12px] font-bold mb-5 text-center break-words border

label.class: block text-gray-600 mb-1.5 font-bold text-[11px] uppercase tracking-wide

flex-1 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 border border-gray-200 bg-white p-3 rounded-xl cursor-pointer hover:border-[#EE4D2D] hover:bg-orange-50 transition shadow-sm relative overflow-hidden group

flex-1 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 border border-gray-200 bg-white p-3 rounded-xl cursor-pointer hover:border-[#EE4D2D] hover:bg-orange-50 transition shadow-sm relative overflow-hidden group

div.class: hidden p-4 bg-orange-50 border border-orange-200 text-[#EE4D2D] rounded-xl text-[12px] font-bold text-center mt-3 shadow-sm

div.div: 🚨 Mohon maaf, pendaftaran untuk Mitra Driver saat ini belum tersedia.

label.class: block text-gray-600 mb-1.5 font-bold text-[11px] uppercase tracking-wide

input.class: w-full border border-gray-300 bg-white rounded-xl px-4 py-3 outline-none focus:border-[#EE4D2D] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-100 text-[14px] font-medium text-gray-800 transition

label.class: block text-gray-600 mb-1.5 font-bold text-[11px] uppercase tracking-wide

input.class: w-full border border-gray-300 bg-white rounded-xl px-4 py-3 outline-none focus:border-[#EE4D2D] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-100 text-[14px] font-medium text-gray-800 transition

label.class: block text-gray-600 font-bold text-[11px] uppercase tracking-wide

input.class: w-full border border-gray-300 bg-white rounded-xl px-4 py-3 outline-none focus:border-[#EE4D2D] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-100 text-[14px] font-medium text-gray-800 transition tracking-widest

button.class: w-full bg-[#EE4D2D] hover:bg-[#D73211] text-white font-extrabold py-3.5 mt-4 rounded-xl shadow-[0_4px_15px_rgba(238,77,45,0.3)] transition border-none outline-none text-[14px] tracking-wide

div.class: w-16 h-16 mx-auto bg-gradient-to-tr from-blue-50 to-blue-100 text-blue-500 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-3xl font-bold mb-3 shadow-inner border border-blue-200

div.p: Masukkan nomor WA dan sandi baru Anda.

div.class: hidden p-3.5 rounded-xl text-[12px] font-bold mb-5 text-center break-words border

label.class: block text-gray-600 mb-1.5 font-bold text-[11px] uppercase tracking-wide

input.class: w-full border border-gray-300 bg-white rounded-xl px-4 py-3 outline-none focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-100 text-[14px] font-medium text-gray-800 transition

button.class: bg-blue-50 text-blue-600 border border-blue-200 px-4 rounded-xl text-[12px] font-bold hover:bg-blue-100 transition whitespace-nowrap outline-none

label.class: block text-gray-600 mb-1.5 font-bold text-[11px] uppercase tracking-wide

input.class: w-full border border-gray-300 bg-white rounded-xl px-4 py-3 outline-none focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-100 text-[14px] font-medium text-gray-800 transition tracking-widest text-center

label.class: block text-gray-600 mb-1.5 font-bold text-[11px] uppercase tracking-wide

input.class: w-full border border-gray-300 bg-white rounded-xl px-4 py-3 outline-none focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-100 text-[14px] font-medium text-gray-800 transition tracking-widest

label.class: block text-gray-600 mb-1.5 font-bold text-[11px] uppercase tracking-wide

input.class: w-full border border-gray-300 bg-white rounded-xl px-4 py-3 outline-none focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-100 text-[14px] font-medium text-gray-800 transition tracking-widest

button.class: flex-1 border border-gray-300 bg-white text-gray-600 py-3.5 rounded-xl font-bold text-[13px] hover:bg-gray-100 transition shadow-sm outline-none
flex-[2] bg-blue-500 hover:bg-blue-600 text-white font-extrabold py-3.5 rounded-xl shadow-[0_4px_15px_rgba(59,130,246,0.3)] transition border-none outline-none text-[13px] tracking-wide

div.class: absolute inset-0 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-sm z-[1100] hidden flex-col items-center justify-center rounded-2xl
w-10 h-10 border-4 border-gray-100 border-t-[#EE4D2D] rounded-full animate-spin mb-3
